resources.string: What on-device filtering can and cannot do

Installing this certificate lets WebFilter inspect the full content of traffic from apps that trust user certificates.

URL, hostname (SNI), DNS-over-HTTPS and QUIC filtering work for every app routed through the VPN, even without the certificate.

Chrome and many hardened apps enforce Certificate Transparency and reject user-installed certificates. Their encrypted traffic is passed through untouched (blind-spliced) rather than broken, so deep content features (text/image NSFW classifiers, YouTube rewriting) do not apply to them.
Selected apps are routed through the filter. Leave all unchecked to filter every app.
